message:
test(ssh): expand SSH config parser test suite with option override, expansion, and pattern tests

config.rs (+80 lines):
- config_set_option_overrides_config_file: verify that set_option()
  takes precedence over Host-matched values from config strings
- config_empty_string / config_comment_only: edge cases for empty
  and comment-only config input (no hosts enumerated)
- config_should_expand_environment_known_keys: verify the 7 known
  environment-expandable keys (certificatefile, controlpath, etc.)
- config_should_not_expand_environment_unknown_keys: hostname, port,
  user are NOT environment-expanded
- config_match_all_stanza: verify "Match all" applies SendEnv to
  any host
- pattern_star_matches_everything: glob star matches empty string,
  plain text, and dotted names
- config_percent_escape: verify %% → % literal expansion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
